our ability to effectively implement technological advancements, including the use of artificial intelligence (AI), and respond to competitors' AI and other technology initiatives
applying generative AI to certain aspects of the underwriting and claims processes in certain lines of business
Technological advancements and innovation in the insurance industry, including...acceleration of automated underwriting, and use of AI and electronic processes present competitive risks

risks include the misuse...of personal data...flaws in our or third-party models or training datasets resulting in biased, inaccurate or unanticipated outcomes, ethical considerations...potential infringement of third-party intellectual property rights

Promotional/risk-disclosure language dominates; actual operational outcomes from AI deployment are not quantified.
